message:
fix: reap child processes in extension exec paths to prevent zombies (closes #41)

The original fix in 391f2c30 only addressed tools.rs (run_bash_command).
The reporter confirmed zombies still occurred because extension_dispatcher.rs
and extensions.rs had the same bug: try_wait() with WNOHANG can observe exit
without fully reaping on macOS process groups. Added explicit child.wait()
calls after the try_wait loops in both non-streaming exec paths. Also bumped
extension_dispatcher's bounded channel from 128 to 1024 to match the other
paths and reduce pipe-deadlock risk.

Credit to @kipanshi for the diagnosis and patch that identified all affected
code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
